series_metadata.series_title: Safety Data Sheets (SDS) formerly Material Safety Data Sheets (MSDS)
series_metadata.series_description: Manufacturer specifications for safe handling of hazardous chemicals or biologics. These records provide information about the ingredients of products, handling requirements, first aid and clean up directions. The Safety Officer is the Record Retention Coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 30 years after obsolete. ; Electronic: Keep for 30 years after obsolete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
